creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194359
subnetcalc-2.4.9.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates net/subnetcalc to 2.4.9.

Changes by upstream:
- https://www.uni-due.de/~be0001/subnetcalc/

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE_FILE
- changed gmake -> cmake in USES
- removed CONFIGURE_ARGS flag
- added post-patch target to fix man path location in CMakeLists.txt

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
